changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: ECB-Pus : Hématies, Leucocytes (Etat frais Quantitatif), Nombre de flore (Gram)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.panel_item (id, panel_id, lastupdated, test_id) SELECT nextval('panel_item_seq'), p.id, now(), t.id FROM clinlims.panel p JOIN clinlims.test t ON t.name IN ( 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Hématies', 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Leucocytes', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Nombre de flore' ) WHERE p.name = 'ECB-Pus' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.panel_item pi WHERE pi.panel_id = p.id AND pi.test_id = t.id );

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: ECBU, ECB-LP, ECB-Pus : Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Polynucléaires (le test est déjà rattaché à ECB-Crachat).
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.panel_item (id, panel_id, lastupdated, test_id) SELECT nextval('panel_item_seq'), p.id, now(), t.id FROM clinlims.panel p JOIN clinlims.test t ON t.name = 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Polynucléaires' WHERE p.name IN ('ECBU', 'ECB-LP', 'ECB-Pus') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.panel_item pi WHERE pi.panel_id = p.id AND pi.test_id = t.id );

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: ECB-Sperme : Hématies, Leucocytes (Etat frais Quantitatif), Nombre de flore (Gram)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.panel_item (id, panel_id, lastupdated, test_id) SELECT nextval('panel_item_seq'), p.id, now(), t.id FROM clinlims.panel p JOIN clinlims.test t ON t.name IN ( 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Hématies', 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Leucocytes', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Nombre de flore' ) WHERE p.name = 'ECB-Sperme' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.panel_item pi WHERE pi.panel_id = p.id AND pi.test_id = t.id );

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: ECB-Materiel : Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Nombre de flore
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.panel_item (id, panel_id, lastupdated, test_id) SELECT nextval('panel_item_seq'), p.id, now(), t.id FROM clinlims.panel p JOIN clinlims.test t ON t.name = 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Nombre de flore' WHERE p.name = 'ECB-Materiel' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.panel_item pi WHERE pi.panel_id = p.id AND pi.test_id = t.id );
